reasoning: This sequence will show a slight, questioning tilt of the head, conveyed through arm movements. The arms will start in a neutral position, move to a pose that subtly suggests a head tilt, and then return to neutral. This reflects the ambiguity often associated with the emoji. The movement will be understated to avoid overwhelming the emoji's inherent subtlety. Frame 1 will show both arms relaxed at the sides. Frame 2 will feature the left arm slightly raised and rotated outward, while the right arm moves down and inward, creating a subtle counterbalance that mimics a head tilt. Frame 3 will return both arms to their original neutral position.
